summary: Frontend testing completed for VisorActualizacion - R1/R2 data loading, polygon click, filter buttons, and visit form opening all working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported issues have been verified as resolved. R1/R2 data loads correctly via pagination, polygon clicks show detail panel, filters work, and visit form opens without lag.

r1_r2_data_loading.details: Data loads correctly with pagination - Total: 3234, Pendientes: 3220, Visitados: 10, Actualizados: 4, Mejoras visible. Console logs confirmed progressive loading from 500 to 3234 predios.

polygon_click_detail_panel.details: Clicking on map polygon shows detail panel with: Estado (Pendiente), Código Predial, Zona, Propietarios, Áreas R1/R2 y GDB, Avalúo, and action buttons (Registrar Visita, Editar Predio, Cancelar Predio, Ver Historial)

filter_buttons.details: 'Todos estados' dropdown shows filter options: Todos estados, Pendientes, Visitados, Actualizados - each with color-coded indicators (blue, yellow, purple)

visit_form_opening.details: 'Registrar Visita' button opens 5-page form modal quickly without lag. Form shows Section 1 (DATOS DE LA VISITA), Section 2 (INFORMACIÓN BÁSICA), Section 4 (Condominio). Page navigation (1-5) and 'Siguiente' button visible.

offline_indicator.details: 'Offline Ready' badge visible in header. Toast shows '6076 geometrías descargadas - Listo para trabajo offline'. 'Offline (6,076)' count visible in top-right corner.

verified_ui_elements.stats_bar: Total: 3234, Pendientes: 3220, Visitados: 10, Actualizados: 4, Mejoras: 1969, Const. ✓ 6912
verified_ui_elements.filter_dropdown: Todos estados dropdown with Pendientes, Visitados, Actualizados options
verified_ui_elements.detail_panel_fields: Estado badge, Código Predial Nacional, Municipio, Zona, Propietarios, Matrícula Inmobiliaria, Áreas (R1/R2 y GDB), Estado GDB, Avalúo Catastral
verified_ui_elements.detail_panel_buttons: Registrar Visita (green), Editar Predio, Cancelar Predio, Ver Historial
verified_ui_elements.visit_form_sections: 1. DATOS DE LA VISITA, 2. INFORMACIÓN BÁSICA, 4. Condominio (visible on page 1)

performance_notes.data_loading: R1/R2 data loads via pagination - first page shows 500 predios immediately, continues loading in background until all 3234 loaded
performance_notes.polygon_click_response: Immediate response when clicking polygon - detail panel appears within 2 seconds
performance_notes.form_opening: Visit form modal opens quickly without noticeable lag - DebouncedInput optimization working
